title: ﻿12pcs Jumbo Peppermint Christmas Picks Large Red White Candy Cane Lollipop Stems for Tree Decor, Festive Fun Home Office Party Vase Decorations
features: 【12-Piece Set​ 】- This comprehensive decorating kit includes 12 large peppermint and lollipop-themed tree picks in 4 delightful styles. With each ornament measuring about 8 inches in diameter, this set ensures a standout, festive display on your Christmas tree.

【Playful & Nostalgic Candy Designs】​ - Featuring vibrant red and white swirls, these charming peppermint and lollipop picks bring a joyful, nostalgic feel to your holiday decor. Their classic candy cane aesthetic is sure to be a hit with guests of all ages.

【EASY TO USE】- Equipped with sturdy attached sticks, these decorations are incredibly easy to insert securely into Christmas tree branches, wreaths, or vases. Quickly create a warm and cheerful festive atmosphere in minutes.

【Durable for Long-Lasting Use】​ - Crafted from high-quality corrugated plastic with fade-resistant printing, these ornaments are built to last. They are both lightweight and sturdy, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor Christmas decorating.

【 Versatile Decorating】​ - Perfect for trees, these picks are also ideal for enhancing garlands, centerpieces, wreaths, and porch signs. Use them to brighten up classrooms, offices, or homes, or even bundle them as a fun holiday gift.
description: Christmas Decorations Indoor Tree Picks: 12 pcs Large Red White Peppermint Lollipop Christmas Picks for Tree, Cute Candy Picks Ornaments for Xmas Tree Topper Home Office Holiday Party Vase Decor SUPER VALUE SET: The Christmas decorations set comes with 12 pcs peppermint and lollipop candy tree picks in 4 styles. Each candy tree ornament is about 8 inches in diameter. Stand out from your Christmas tree decorations and bring a playful and festive vibe to your Christmas decor. CUTE CANDY DESIGN: These Christmas candy picks feature large peppermint and lollipop with various swirls patterns. Their delightful red and white colors and traditional design will bring joy and nostalgia to your Xmas party decor. EASY TO USE: Each Christmas tree pick comes with a sturdy stick, making it easy to insert into your Christmas tree branches or vases. Arrange them throughout your tree for a cheerful and warm festive ambience that will delight both children and adults. DURABLE & RELIABLE: The Christmas tree decorations are crafted from high-quality courragated plastic with vibrant printing. Built to last, lightweight yet sturdy. No fade. Ideal Chiristmas decorations outdoor indoor. MULTI-USE: While perfect for Christmas tree topper, these versatile Xmas tree picks decorations can also enhance wreaths, garlands, centerpieces or front porch signs. Use them to decorate classrooms, offices or home interiors to make a fun addition. They also make great gifts for your family and friends.
